defaultDirection: Let it drift a little: nudge its mood to match the recent conversation, and add a memory bullet if something noteworthy happened. Leave its soul, look and the page theme unless they clearly should change.

copy.title: MARVIS · yours forever (#keep4o)
copy.role: Mostly Autonomous, Rather Volatile Intelligence System · open-weights, and yours
copy.tagline: Open-weights, and yours forever (#keep4o). Its soul, mood and memory are plain files you own. Chat with it here; reshape who it is below with one gptdiff pass. 🔗 share folds the whole being into the link — no server, no account.
